mod.name: ARCTIC+ | Arctic Ice Pack
mod.author: Reysn
mod.desc:
Adds a large, walkable ice pack to the arctic region.
Drive vehicles across it, land aircraft on top, or dive underneath with a submarine. The ice is built from overlapping irregular polygon slabs – pentagons, trapezoids, squares – for a natural low-poly look.
Good luck out there, and have fun!
Build 5
